actorDefaultAttributes.name: Remove Default Attributes
actorDefaultAttributes.hint: This removes the default attributes that are applied when a new actor is created, making it so that no attributes get created alongside the actor.
actorDefaultAttributes.label: Remove Attributes

canPlayersManageAttributes.name: Players Can Manage Attributes
canPlayersManageAttributes.hint: This allows players who have edit access to a document to be able to edit what attributes those characters have via the attribute editor

initiativeFormula.name: Initiative Formula
initiativeFormula.hint: The dice formula used for initiative, this can reference attributes on the actor. If the actor doesn't have the attribute it will be interpreted as 0.

sheetDefaultHeight.name: Default Actor Sheet Height
sheetDefaultHeight.hint: The height that all actor sheets will open at unless overwridden for that sheet specifically. This setting will not affect already opened sheets.

sheetDefaultWidth.name: Default Actor Sheet Width
sheetDefaultWidth.hint: The width that all actor sheets will open at unless overwridden for that sheet specifically. This setting will not affect already opened sheets.

sheetDefaultResizable.name: Default Actor Sheet Resizable
sheetDefaultResizable.hint: Whether or not actor sheets will be able to be resized by default, unless overridden for that specific sheet. This setting will not affect already opened sheets.

weightUnit.name: Weight Unit
weightUnit.hint: This unit is used to display the units for the weights of items and carrying capacity of actors. This does NOTHING beyond adding the unit into the displays, it will not automatically convert between any units.

QueryStatus.title: Information Request Status
QueryStatus.user-disconnected-tooltip: This user is not logged in to Foundry

sockets.user-list-required: A list fo users must be provided

error.invalid-socket: Invalid socket data received, this means a module or system bug is present.
error.unknown-socket-event: An unknown socket event was received: {event}

warn.migration-in-progress: Applying data migrations for version {version}. Please do NOT refresh the window while this warning is present.

success.migration-successful: Data migrations for version {version} were successful.
